steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Factor the left side.
$$7x^2-20x-32=(7x+8)(x-4)$$
So the equation becomes
$$(7x+8)(x-4)=0$$

steps.title: Find both solutions
steps.content:
Use the zero product property.
$$7x+8=0\text{ or }x-4=0$$
$$x=-\frac{8}{7}\text{ or }x=4$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the equation or solve it directly in a calculator, then choose the positive root. The answer is 4.
